## Issue success criteria
- âś… `proofs/` scaffolding and Lean pins exist (`proofs/lean-toolchain`, `proofs/lakefile.lean`), including explicit Mathlib (`proofs/lakefile.lean:8-10`).
- âś… CI now runs end-to-end regeneration (`.github/workflows/ci.yml:156-160`) and checks generated-file drift (`:161-167`).
- âś… Evidence of both `gfp` and `gfpn` in generated Lean (`proofs/Gf2Core/Types.lean:114, 132-156`) and const-generic handling documented (`proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md:55-57`).
- âš ď¸Ź Success criterion "`lake build` compiles generated code" is evidenced for prior commit `86d24c...` (`.jit/gate-runs/78148024.../result.json:7-10,16`) but not re-verified on current HEAD `22135f4...`.

## No technical debt
- âś… Latest previously flagged inconsistency is fixed: Charon source-of-truth now aligns across CI (`ci.yml:127,134`), docs (`proofs/README.md:30-33`, `proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md:63`), and script commentary (`scripts/verify-lean.sh:22`).
- âťŚ Validation debt remains unresolved for this reviewed HEAD: no local lint/test/build evidence could be produced in this environment, and no remote CI run exists for this commit.

## Separation of concerns
- âś… Dependency direction is correct: `gf2-core` does not depend on `gf2-coding` (`crates/gf2-core/Cargo.toml:12-19`), while `gf2-coding` depends on `gf2-core` (`crates/gf2-coding/Cargo.toml:13`).

## Functional paradigm and performance
- âś… Reviewed delta is infra/docs/CI/patch plumbing; no Rust hot-path GF(2) algorithm changes were introduced.

## Correctness (tail masking, bit numbering, field axioms)
- âś… No `BitVec`/GF(2) mutator code changed in this delta, so tail-masking and bit-index invariants are not newly at risk.
- âś… Verification scope claims for `gfp`/`gfpn` are now consistent in primary verification docs and generated artifacts.

## Testing
- âťŚ Required checks could not be executed locally: `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`, `cargo test`, and `lake build` all returned **"Permission denied and could not request permission from user"**.
- âťŚ No substitute CI evidence for this exact HEAD: branch `formal-verification` has zero workflow runs, and commit `22135f48...` is not present on remote (`No commit found for SHA`).

## Unsafe isolation
- âś… `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` remains in `gf2-core` and `gf2-coding` (`crates/gf2-core/src/lib.rs:35`, `crates/gf2-coding/src/lib.rs:8`), and no new non-SIMD unsafe usage was detected in reviewed sources.

## Documentation
- âś… Mathlib dependency and patched-Charon workflow are now clearly documented (`proofs/lakefile.lean`, `proofs/README.md`, `proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md`, `dev/lean4-verification-pipeline.md`).
- âš ď¸Ź Secondary planning doc still contains stale historical statements (`dev/plans/formal_verification.md:45,49,56`), which can mislead readers even if implementation docs are corrected.

## Prior review feedback (most recent run)
- âś… Addressed: Charon pin/source consistency and `verify-lean.sh` comment mismatch.
- âťŚ Unresolved: inability to certify clean lint/test/build status for the currently reviewed HEAD.

## Jit issue dependencies
